mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lib_book (isbn, cover, name, intro, author, press_id, publish_time, category_id, price) VALUES (#{book.isbn}, #{book.cover}, #{book.name}, #{book.intro}, #{book.author}, #{book.pressId}, #{book.publishTime}, #{book.categoryId}, #{book.price}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE isbn = isbn
mapper.select: SELECT b.isbn, b.cover, b.name, b.intro, b.author, b.press_id, b.publish_time, b.category_id, b.price, s.shelf_id, sh.shelf_no FROM lib_book AS b LEFT JOIN lib_stock AS s ON s.isbn = b.isbn LEFT JOIN lib_bookshelf AS sh ON sh.id = s.shelf_id WHERE b.isbn = #{isbn}
